title: Aehr Receives $25.1 Million Order for FOX-XP Test and Burn-in Systems
text: Aehr Test Systems announced a major $25.1 million follow-on order from a Fortune 500 semiconductor supplier for FOX-XP wafer-level test and burn-in systems. The order reflects significant ramp-up in test capacity for silicon carbide power devices used in electric vehicles. The customer ordered systems configured to test 18 silicon carbide wafers simultaneously, increasing their burn-in capacity by over 50%. Shipments are scheduled from Q4 FY2023 through Q2 FY2024. The announcement highlights market projections forecasting silicon carbide wafer demand for EVs to grow from 119,000 wafers in 2021 to 4.1 million by 2030, representing 48.4% compound annual growth.
